message:
fix(buffer): prevent division by zero for zero-dimension buffers

OptimizedBuffer::new() now clamps width and height to minimum of 1.
This prevents division by zero in iter_cells() which divides by width.

Previously, creating a 0x0 buffer and iterating over it would panic.
Now, 0x0 buffers become 1x1 buffers with a single transparent cell.

Updated tests to reflect the new safe behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
